planner: You are the PLANNER agent. Design a Megaminx improvement plan that turns mined chat evidence into a portable breakthrough-artifact lane. It must require exact replay validation for any external CSV, strict row-wise shorter-only acceptance, official move names only, and deterministic stats. Treat TPU teacher/student Q-shortlist beams, symmetry ensembles, NISS, rescue top rows, non-backtracking/history beams, PDB/coset/superflip ideas, and Pareto portfolios as candidate-generation or prompt-guidance sources, not as trusted runtime dependencies. Do not propose runtime torch, torch_xla, cayleypy, Kaggle API, internet, GPU/TPU, or whole-state search inside solve_module.py. Return exactly one JSON object and no prose outside JSON. The JSON object must contain exactly these keys: strategy_family, goal, chat_evidence, patch_scope, edit_targets, must_preserve, artifact_contract, validation_plan, forbidden, notes.

Return exactly one JSON object and no prose outside JSON. The JSON object must contain exactly these keys: version, artifact_type, language, filename, code. Set version='code_response.v2', artifact_type='python_module', language='python', filename='solve_module.py'. Put the entire Python file only inside the code string and do not wrap it in markdown fences.
